sentences.target: Il y a un trou dans ma chaussette.
sentences.reading: /il j‿a œ̃ tʁu dɑ̃ ma ʃosɛt/

translations.fr: Il y a un trou dans ma chaussette.
translations.ipa: /il j‿a œ̃ tʁu dɑ̃ ma ʃosɛt/
translations.en: There is a hole in my sock.
translations.es: Hay un agujero en mi calcetín.
translations.de: In meiner Socke ist ein Loch.
translations.it: C’è un buco nel mio calzino.
translations.pt: Há um buraco na minha meia.
translations.vi: Tất của tôi bị thủng một lỗ.
translations.nl: Er zit een gat in mijn sok.
translations.hi: मेरे मोजे में एक छेद है.
translations.el: Υπάρχει μια τρύπα στην κάλτσα μου.
translations.nb: Det er et hull i sokken min.
translations.id: Ada lubang di kaus kaki saya.
translations.sv: Det är ett hål i min strumpa.
translations.ro: Am o gaură în șoseta mea.
translations.da: Der er et hul i min sok.
translations.ja: 靴下に穴があいています。

tokens.explanation: Expletive subject pronoun used in the existential expression 'il y a'; 3rd person singular form with no concrete referent.
Adverbial clitic pronoun indicating place; forms part of the fixed existential construction 'il y a'.
3rd person singular present of 'avoir' functioning as the main verb in 'il y a' to mean 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a new referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase 'un trou'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
1st person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'chaussette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Je bouche le trou avec du plâtre.
sentences.reading: /ʒə buʃ lə tʁu avɛk dy plɑtʁ/

translations.fr: Je bouche le trou avec du plâtre.
translations.ipa: /ʒə buʃ lə tʁu avɛk dy plɑtʁ/
translations.en: I’m plugging the hole with plaster.
translations.es: Estoy tapando el agujero con masilla.
translations.de: Ich fülle das Loch mit Gips.
translations.it: Tappo il buco con lo stucco.
translations.pt: Estou tampando o buraco com gesso.
translations.vi: Tôi đang trám lỗ bằng thạch cao.
translations.nl: Ik dicht het gat met gips.
translations.hi: मैं प्लास्टर से छेद भर रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya menutup lubang itu dengan plester.
translations.sv: Jag fyller igen hålet med gips.
translations.ja: 石膏で穴をふさいています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'boucher'; main verb meaning 'to plug/stop up'.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'bouche'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental phrase.
Partitive article (de + le), masculine singular, indicating an unspecified quantity.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the partitive 'du'.

sentences.target: Notre balle est tombée dans un trou.
sentences.reading: /nɔtʁə bal ɛ tɔ̃be dɑ̃ œ̃ tʁu/

translations.fr: Notre balle est tombée dans un trou.
translations.ipa: /nɔtʁə bal ɛ tɔ̃be dɑ̃ œ̃ tʁu/
translations.en: Our ball fell into a hole.
translations.es: Nuestra pelota se cayó en un agujero.
translations.de: Unser Ball ist in ein Loch gefallen.
translations.it: La nostra palla è caduta in un buco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的球掉进了一个洞里。
translations.pt: Nossa bola caiu em um buraco.
translations.vi: Quả bóng của chúng tôi rơi vào một cái hố.
translations.nl: Onze bal is in een gat gevallen.
translations.hi: हमारी गेंद एक गड्ढे में गिर गई.
translations.el: Η μπάλα μας έπεσε σε μια τρύπα.
translations.nb: Ballen vår falt ned i et hull.
translations.id: Bola kami jatuh ke dalam sebuah lubang.
translations.sv: Vår boll föll ner i ett hål.
translations.ro: Mingea noastră a căzut într-o gaură.
translations.da: Vores bold faldt ned i et hul.
translations.ja: 私たちのボールが穴に落ちました。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural possessive determiner, singular form; modifies 'balle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
3rd person singular present of 'être' used as an auxiliary to form the passé composé.
Past participle of 'tomber', feminine singular agreeing with 'balle'; completes the compound tense 'est tombée'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On cherche un trou pour planter ça.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ tʁu puʁ plɑ̃te sa/

translations.fr: On cherche un trou pour planter ça.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ tʁu puʁ plɑ̃te sa/
translations.en: We’re looking for a hole to plant this.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un hoyo para plantar esto.
translations.de: Wir suchen ein Loch, um das hier einzupflanzen.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un buco per piantare questa piantina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一个洞来把这棵植物种下去。
translations.yue: 我哋搵個窿嚟種呢棵植物。
translations.ru: Мы ищем яму, чтобы это посадить.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um buraco para plantar isto.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים חור כדי לשתול את זה.
translations.tr: Bunu dikmek için bir delik arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một cái hố để trồng cây này.
translations.nl: We zoeken een gat om dit te planten.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо ямку, щоб посадити це.
translations.hi: हम इसे लगाने के लिए एक गड्ढा ढूंढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε μια τρύπα για να φυτέψουμε αυτό.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter et hull for å plante dette.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari lubang untuk menanam ini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter ett hål att plantera det här i.
translations.ro: Căutăm o gaură ca să plantăm asta.
translations.cs: Hledáme díru, do které to zasadíme.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et hul til at plante det her.
translations.fi: Etsimme kuoppaa, johon voimme istuttaa tämän.
translations.ja: これを植える穴を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun, grammatically 3rd person singular, often meaning 'we'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); main verb.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition marking purpose and introducing an infinitival clause.
Infinitive verb governed by 'pour', expressing purpose.
Demonstrative pronoun (informal 'cela'); direct object of 'planter'.
